landing.heroSub: Post the project you can't stop thinking about, or lend your skills to one that's already moving. No pitch decks, no gatekeepers — just people who build.
landing.liveboardEmpty: Nothing here yet. Be the first on the board.
landing.startStep1Body: A title, a one-line pitch, and the skills you're missing.
landing.startStep2Body: People who want in tell you what they bring.
landing.startStep3Body: Reply to the ones who fit, and start building.
landing.joinStep1Body: Filter by category, stage, or the skills they need.
landing.joinStep2Body: Say what you can do and why this one caught your eye.
landing.joinStep3Body: The project owner replies straight to your inbox.
landing.bandSub: It takes two minutes to post a project, and less to ask to join one.

browse.title: Open projects
browse.error: Couldn't reach the API. Is the backend running?
browse.emptyBoard: The board is empty. First one on it gets the spotlight.

detail.notFound: That project isn't on the board. It may have been removed.
detail.noJoinYet: No join requests yet — be the first
detail.successBodyPost: if it's a match. In the meantime, the board is full of other projects.
detail.messagePlaceholder: What you'd work on, what you bring…
detail.requestError: Request didn't go through. Check that the API is running, then try again.
detail.ownerCta: Project owner? Build the onboarding kit
detail.trackInInbox: Track this request in your inbox →

start.lede: Two minutes of honesty about what you're building and who you need. That's the whole pitch.
start.titlePlaceholder: Give it a name people will remember
start.pitchPlaceholder: What it is, in one sentence
start.descriptionPlaceholder: The problem, your plan, where it stands. Blank lines make paragraphs.
start.skillsPlaceholder: react, design, marketing… press Enter after each
start.publishError: Publish failed. Check your connection, then try again.

onboarding.title: Onboarding kit
onboarding.lockedTitle: This kit is for the team
onboarding.lockedBody: The project owner shares a private link when they accept you. If you received a key, paste it below.
onboarding.keyPlaceholder: The key from your acceptance message
onboarding.wrongKey: That key doesn't open this kit. Check the link you received.
onboarding.notFound: This project hasn't published an onboarding kit yet.
onboarding.loadError: Couldn't reach the API. Try again in a moment.
onboarding.editLede: Everything a new teammate needs on day one: the tools, the links, the rhythm. Saving gives you a private link to send with each acceptance.
onboarding.gatePlaceholder: The email you published the project with
onboarding.gateHint: Checked against the project on the server — it never becomes public.
onboarding.gateError: That email doesn't match this project.
onboarding.welcomePlaceholder: Say hello. What this project is about, and what joining it means. Blank lines make paragraphs.
onboarding.toolsHint: The stack: repos, design files, docs…
onboarding.appsHint: Where the team talks and meets.
onboarding.checklistHint: What a new teammate should do first.
onboarding.saveError: Save failed. Check that the API is running, then try again.
onboarding.savedBody: Send this private link with each acceptance — it's the key to the kit.
onboarding.viewSignInHeading: Sign in to view this kit
onboarding.viewSignInBlurb: The onboarding kit is for accepted contributors. Sign in with the email you applied with.
onboarding.notMemberBody: This kit opens once the owner accepts your request. If you've applied, keep an eye on your inbox.
onboarding.notPublishedBody: You're in — the owner just hasn't built the onboarding kit yet. Check back soon.
onboarding.savedBodyMembership: Saved. Accepted contributors can now open this kit from their inbox — no link to share, no key to manage.

auth.title: Sign in to continue
auth.blurb: We'll send a one-time link to your email — no password to remember.
auth.error: Couldn't send the link. Check the address and try again.
auth.checkEmailBody: We sent a sign-in link to {{email}}. Open it on this device to continue.

requests.title: Join requests
requests.gateLede: The people who want in, and what they bring. Accept or decline each — accepted contributors join the public members board.
requests.consent: Accepting adds a contributor’s name and skills to the public members board — never their email.
requests.empty: No requests yet. Share your project to get the first.
requests.decideError: That didn’t go through. Check the API is running, then try again.

inbox.title: Your requests
inbox.signInHeading: Sign in to see your requests
inbox.signInBlurb: Track the projects you’ve applied to, and get the onboarding kit the moment you’re accepted.
inbox.empty: You haven’t applied to any projects yet.

members.title: Members
members.empty: No members yet — accepted contributors show up here.
